name: SomeIpGetProtocolVersion
title: SomeIpGetProtocolVersion
description: This function returns the Protocol Version from the SOME/IP message header.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the SOME/IP message (e.g. see OnSomeIpMessage)

return:
Protocol version
In the Event of an error, the function returns the value 0. The SomeIpGetLastError function can then be used to check whether the value is valid or an error has occurred.
